name: Fresh Limeade
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and boiling water in a pitcher, stirring until the sugar dissolves completely.
2. Add grated lime rind, fresh lime juice, and cold water to the pitcher. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
4. Serve over ice in glasses. Garnish with lime slices and mint sprigs.
5. Yield: Approximately 2 quarts.
